Our Services

Comprehensive support combining legal assistance, psychosocial care, and community-based justice solutions.

Legal Aid

Free legal assistance to survivors of torture and human rights violations.

Learn More

Alternative Justice (AJS)

Traditional and community-based dispute resolution methods.

Learn More

Psychosocial Support

Confidential counseling and mental health services.

Learn More

Education & Training

Capacity building for human rights defenders.
